notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.
AdminKit Core is still side-by-side and not active globally in production webhook routing.
Core menu can be sent manually to canary admin through /debug/core-canary-send with token guard.
Core callback bridge layer is now installed before legacy webhook handlers.
The bridge handles only message_callback updates whose callback payload contains field r, for admins allowed by ADMINKIT_CORE_CANARY_ADMINS and when ADMINKIT_CORE_SEND_ENABLED=1.
Non-core callbacks, non-canary admins, and closed gates fall through to legacy handlers.
The canary webhook path is still not auto-registered in MAX; production webhook registration still uses the legacy webhook path.
The delivery adapter removes Core metadata from outbound inline_keyboard payload and keeps only payload.buttons for MAX API compatibility.
Next migration step: click Core inline buttons in MAX and confirm they are handled by bridge for canary admin 17507246.
